title: Clean Creatives Will Push Cannes Lions To Stop Awarding Work Promoting Fossil Fuels
description: The group will make its case on panel sessions and in the streets (particularly along the Croisette) where it will solicit pledges from agencies to shun work related to fossil fuels.

title: Scientists decipher ancient origins of Euphrates River, cradle of civilisation
description: The Euphrates appears to have been born between 3.6 million and 1.6 million years ago.

title: Scientists Captured Rare Footage of a “Living Fossil” Shark Nearly 700 Meters Deeper Than Ever Before in the Remote Waters of the Pacific
description: Among the strangest animals in the ocean, this rarely seen shark has long remained out of reach. New observations have finally brought it into view.
